name: research_keywords
description: Research keyword data (search volume, difficulty, CPC, related ideas) for 1-5 seed keywords in one call. Charges credits per seed (~50-200 credits each, varies by source). Returns per-seed results — a single bad seed won't fail the batch.

projectId.description: Required. The OpenSEO project ID to scope this call to. Get one from list_projects.

locationCode.description: DataForSEO location code. Defaults to 2840 (United States). See dataforseo.com/help-center/locations.

seeds.description: 1-5 seed keywords. Each seed is researched independently and returns related keywords with volume/difficulty/CPC. Bulk-friendly — prefer this over multiple single-seed calls.

resultLimit.description: Max keywords returned per seed. Defaults to 150.
